seoTitle: Cree Wolfspeed Solutions | EV, Renewable Energy, Industrial | LiTong
seoDescription: Explore Cree Wolfspeed power solutions for electric vehicles, renewable energy, and industrial applications. SiC and GaN reference designs and technical support.

faqs.question: What solution categories does Wolfspeed offer?
faqs.answer: Wolfspeed offers comprehensive power solutions across three key categories: Electric Vehicle solutions including traction inverters, onboard chargers, and DC-DC converters utilizing SiC MOSFETs for maximum efficiency and power density; Renewable Energy solutions featuring solar inverters and energy storage systems that leverage SiC technology for higher efficiency and reliability; and Industrial Power solutions encompassing motor drives, power supplies, and welding equipment that benefit from SiC's high-frequency capability and reduced losses. Each solution includes reference designs, evaluation kits, and comprehensive technical documentation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our solution categories below or contact our FAE team for customized solution recommendations.

faqs.question: How can SiC technology improve my power system design?
faqs.answer: SiC technology benefits for power systems: (1) Efficiency - 70-90% lower switching losses than silicon IGBTs. (2) Frequency - Switch at 100kHz+ vs 20kHz for IGBT, enabling smaller magnetics. (3) Temperature - Higher junction temperature (200°C) improves reliability. (4) Size - 30-50% reduction in system size and weight. (5) Cooling - Reduced cooling requirements due to lower losses. (6) Cost - Higher device cost offset by system cost savings. (7) Performance - Higher power density and better dynamic response. SiC enables next-generation power systems with breakthrough performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: SiC is ideal for applications requiring highest efficiency, compact size, or high-frequency operation.

faqs.question: Does Wolfspeed provide reference designs for EV applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, Wolfspeed provides comprehensive EV reference designs: (1) Traction inverters - Complete 150kW+ inverter designs with control. (2) Onboard chargers - 11kW and 22kW OBC reference designs. (3) DC-DC converters - HV to LV converter designs for EVs. (4) Fast charging - 350kW DC fast charger module designs. (5) Documentation - Full schematics, BOM, and layout files. (6) Software - Control algorithms and firmware. (7) Support - FAE support for customization. Reference designs accelerate EV power system development.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with Wolfspeed reference designs to accelerate your EV power system development.

solutions.name: Electric Vehicle Powertrain
solutions.subtitle: High-Efficiency Traction Inverter Solutions
solutions.description: Wolfspeed SiC MOSFETs enable next-generation EV traction inverters with industry-leading efficiency and power density. Our solutions support power levels from 50kW to 300kW+.
solutions.longDescription: Wolfspeed's EV traction inverter solutions leverage third-generation SiC MOSFET technology to deliver unprecedented performance. With switching frequencies up to 100kHz and efficiencies exceeding 99%, these solutions enable smaller, lighter, and more efficient EV powertrains. The solutions include comprehensive reference designs, gate driver recommendations, thermal management guidelines, and control algorithms. Wolfspeed's automotive-qualified devices meet AEC-Q101 standards with full PPAP support, making them ideal for high-volume EV production.
features: Complete reference designs with schematics and BOM

faeInsights.content: Wolfspeed's Gen 3 SiC MOSFETs have revolutionized EV traction inverter design. The C3M0032120K delivers exceptional efficiency with its 32mΩ Rds(on) and Kelvin source connection. For 800V EV systems, I recommend using the 1200V devices with +18V/-5V gate drive and dedicated isolated drivers with desaturation protection. The key to maximizing performance is proper PCB layout with minimal gate loop inductance and adequate thermal management.
keyTakeaways: Kelvin source connection is essential for high-speed switching
Implement desaturation detection with <2μs response time
recommendations: Start with Wolfspeed reference designs for fastest time to market
Contact LiTong FAE for design review before PCB layout
Use SpeedFit calculator for loss and thermal estimation

faqs.question: What power levels can Wolfspeed EV traction inverters support?
faqs.answer: Wolfspeed EV traction inverter power levels: (1) Compact EVs - 50-100kW using discrete devices. (2) Mid-size EVs - 100-200kW with discrete or small modules. (3) Full-size EVs - 200-300kW using power modules. (4) Performance EVs - 300kW+ with parallel modules. (5) Commercial vehicles - Up to 500kW with multiple modules. (6) Voltage - 400V and 800V battery systems supported. (7) Scalability - Modular designs allow power scaling. Wolfspeed solutions cover the full range of EV applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select discrete devices for <150kW; power modules for >150kW or high-volume production.

faqs.question: How does SiC improve EV range compared to IGBT?
faqs.answer: SiC vs IGBT EV range improvement: (1) Efficiency gain - 2-3% higher inverter efficiency. (2) Loss reduction - 70% lower switching losses. (3) Range impact - 5-10% improvement in EV range. (4) Battery savings - Smaller battery for same range. (5) Cooling - Reduced cooling system power. (6) Weight - Lighter inverter reduces vehicle weight. (7) Cost - System cost savings offset device cost. SiC traction inverters are key to maximizing EV range.
faqs.decisionGuide: SiC traction inverters provide 5-10% range improvement; essential for premium EVs.

faqs.question: What gate drive solutions work best with Wolfspeed SiC for EV traction?
faqs.answer: Recommended gate drivers for EV traction: (1) Isolated drivers - 2500Vrms isolation minimum. (2) Voltage - +15V/-5V or +18V/-3V output. (3) Current - 5A peak minimum, 10A preferred. (4) Protection - Desaturation detection essential. (5) Soft shutdown - Required for fault protection. (6) Miller clamp - Prevents false turn-on. (7) Options - TI UCC217xx, Infineon 1EDI, Broadcom ACPL. Gate drive is critical for SiC performance and protection.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use automotive-qualified isolated drivers with desaturation protection and soft shutdown.

faqs.question: What thermal management is required for EV traction inverters?
faqs.answer: EV traction inverter thermal design: (1) Liquid cooling - Typical for high-power inverters. (2) Coolant - Water-glycol mixture at 60-70°C. (3) Flow rate - 10-15 L/min for 200kW inverter. (4) Thermal interface - Phase-change material or high-performance grease. (5) Heatsink - Optimized cold plate design. (6) Temperature monitoring - NTC sensors in modules. (7) Derating - Design for 150°C maximum junction. Proper thermal design ensures reliable operation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use liquid cooling for inverters >100kW; design for Tj < 150°C for automotive reliability.

faqs.question: Does Wolfspeed provide motor control software for traction inverters?
faqs.answer: Yes, Wolfspeed provides motor control resources: (1) Control algorithms - FOC and DTC implementations. (2) Reference code - Example code for common MCUs. (3) PWM strategies - Optimized for SiC switching. (4) Protection - Overcurrent, overvoltage, overtemperature. (5) Efficiency optimization - MTPA and flux weakening. (6) Documentation - Application notes and guides. (7) Support - FAE assistance for customization. Software resources accelerate inverter development.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with Wolfspeed reference code; customize for your specific motor and application.

faqs.question: What safety and reliability standards do Wolfspeed EV solutions meet?
faqs.answer: Wolfspeed EV safety and reliability: (1) AEC-Q101 - Automotive qualification for all EV devices. (2) IATF 16949 - Manufacturing quality certification. (3) Functional safety - ISO 26262 support documentation. (4) PPAP - Full production part approval process. (5) Reliability - >1,000,000 hours MTBF. (6) Power cycling - 100,000+ cycles capability. (7) Traceability - Full lot traceability for safety. Wolfspeed devices meet the highest automotive standards.
faqs.decisionGuide: Wolfspeed devices are fully qualified for automotive; all documentation available for safety systems.

solutions.title: cree Solution 1

solutions.name: Renewable Energy Systems
solutions.subtitle: Solar Inverter and Energy Storage Solutions
solutions.description: Wolfspeed SiC power solutions maximize energy harvest and efficiency in solar inverters and energy storage systems. Our technology enables higher switching frequencies and improved reliability.
solutions.longDescription: Wolfspeed's renewable energy solutions leverage SiC technology to deliver industry-leading efficiency and reliability for solar inverters and energy storage systems. With switching frequencies up to 100kHz, these solutions enable smaller magnetics and filters while maintaining >99% efficiency. The solutions support power levels from residential 5kW to utility-scale 250kW+ inverters. Wolfspeed provides comprehensive reference designs, including MPPT algorithms, grid-tie control, and anti-islanding protection. The high-temperature capability and robust reliability of SiC devices make them ideal for demanding outdoor installations.

faeInsights.content: SiC technology is a game-changer for solar inverter efficiency. The combination of C3M SiC MOSFETs and C3D SiC Schottky diodes eliminates reverse recovery losses and enables switching frequencies above 50kHz. This allows for smaller magnetics and filters, reducing system cost while improving reliability. For 1500V systems, use 1700V-rated devices with proper clearance and creepage design.
keyTakeaways: SiC enables >99% inverter efficiency vs 98% for IGBT
Higher switching frequency reduces magnetics size by 50%
Zero reverse recovery eliminates diode switching losses
recommendations: Use C3D diodes for boost PFC and output rectification
Implement proper EMI filtering for high-frequency switching

faqs.question: What types of solar inverters can use Wolfspeed SiC solutions?
faqs.answer: Wolfspeed solar inverter applications: (1) Residential - 5-10kW single-phase string inverters. (2) Commercial - 30-100kW three-phase string inverters. (3) Utility - 100-250kW+ central inverters. (4) Microinverters - Module-level power electronics. (5) Power optimizers - DC-DC converters with MPPT. (6) Hybrid - Solar plus battery storage inverters. (7) Voltage - 1000V and 1500V DC systems. Wolfspeed solutions cover all solar inverter topologies.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use discrete devices for string inverters; power modules for central inverters.

faqs.question: How does SiC improve solar inverter efficiency?
faqs.answer: SiC solar inverter efficiency benefits: (1) Conduction - Lower Rds(on) reduces conduction loss. (2) Switching - Zero reverse recovery eliminates diode loss. (3) Frequency - Higher frequency reduces magnetics loss. (4) Overall - 1-2% efficiency improvement vs IGBT. (5) Energy yield - More energy harvested over system life. (6) Cooling - Reduced cooling power consumption. (7) Reliability - Lower temperature improves longevity. SiC maximizes energy harvest and ROI.
faqs.decisionGuide: SiC improves efficiency by 1-2%; significant impact on 25-year energy yield.

faqs.question: What MPPT voltage ranges are supported by Wolfspeed solutions?
faqs.answer: Wolfspeed MPPT voltage support: (1) Residential - 200-500V for typical string configurations. (2) Commercial - 500-1000V for larger arrays. (3) Utility - 1000-1500V for utility-scale systems. (4) Wide range - SiC devices handle wide voltage swings. (5) Efficiency - High efficiency across full voltage range. (6) Startup - Low voltage startup capability. (7) Tracking - Fast MPPT algorithm response. Wolfspeed devices support all standard MPPT voltage ranges.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select devices based on maximum DC voltage; SiC handles wide MPPT ranges efficiently.

faqs.question: How do Wolfspeed solutions support 1500V solar systems?
faqs.answer: Wolfspeed 1500V solar solutions: (1) Devices - 1700V SiC MOSFETs available. (2) Benefits - Lower current, reduced losses for same power. (3) String length - Longer strings reduce BOS costs. (4) Efficiency - Higher efficiency at 1500V vs 1000V. (5) Inverters - Central inverters up to 250kW+. (6) Safety - Proper clearance and isolation design. (7) Standards - Meet IEC 62109 for 1500V systems. Wolfspeed enables next-generation 1500V solar systems.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use 1700V SiC devices for 1500V systems; significant BOS cost savings.

faqs.question: What grid compliance standards do Wolfspeed solar solutions meet?
faqs.answer: Wolfspeed grid compliance: (1) IEEE 1547 - US grid interconnection standard. (2) IEC 62109 - Safety requirements for PV inverters. (3) IEC 61727 - PV system utility interface. (4) VDE-AR-N 4105 - German grid code. (5) G99/G100 - UK grid connection requirements. (6) AS 4777 - Australian standard. (7) Support - Documentation and test reports available. Wolfspeed solutions support global grid compliance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Wolfspeed provides documentation for major grid codes; verify specific regional requirements.

faqs.question: Can Wolfspeed solutions be used for energy storage systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, Wolfspeed solutions support energy storage: (1) Battery inverters - Bidirectional DC-AC conversion. (2) DC-DC converters - Battery charge/discharge control. (3) Efficiency - High round-trip efficiency critical for storage. (4) Power - Residential to utility-scale systems. (5) Batteries - Li-ion, LFP, and other chemistries. (6) Grid services - Frequency regulation, peak shaving. (7) Integration - Solar plus storage solutions. SiC efficiency maximizes storage system value.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use SiC for highest efficiency in battery inverters; bidirectional designs supported.
